records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5777 - The Prophet (sw) said; "The fortunate one is he who learns a lesson from others."
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The fortunate one is he who learns a lesson from others."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5778 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"The wretched one is he who is destined for wretchedness while in his mother's womb."
records.arabicText: 5778 - اَلشَّقِيُّ مَنْ شَقِيَ فِي بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The wretched one is he who is destined for wretchedness while in his mother's womb."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5779 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Your ultimate destination (grave) is four cubits."
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "Your ultimate destination (grave) is four cubits."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5780 - The Prophet (sw) said; "The greatest form of usury is lying."
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The greatest form of usury is lying."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5781 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Insulting a believer is wickedness, fighting a believer is disbelief, consuming his flesh (backbiting) is disobedience to Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, and the sanctity of his wealth is like the sanctity of his blood."
records.arabicText: 5781 - سِبَابُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ فُسُوقٌ قِتَالُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ كُفْرٌ أَكْلُ لَحْمِهِ مِنْ مَعْصِيَةِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ حُرْمَةُ مَالِهِ كَحُرْمَةِ دَمِهِ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "Insulting a believer is wickedness, fighting a believer is disbelief, consuming his flesh (backbiting) is disobedience to Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, and the sanctity of his wealth is like the sanctity of his blood."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5782 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Whoever suppresses anger, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, will reward him."
records.arabicText: 5782 - مَنْ يَكْظِمِ اَلْغَيْظَ يَأْجُرْهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "Whoever suppresses anger, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, will reward him."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5783 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Whoever is patient during a calamity, Allah (swt) will compensate him."
records.arabicText: 5783 - مَنْ يَصْبِرْ عَلَى اَلرَّزِيَّةِ يُعَوِّضْهُ اَللَّهُ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever is patient during a calamity, Allah (swt) will compensate him."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5785 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"A believer is not stung from the same hole twice."
records.arabicText: 5785 - لاَ يُلْسَعُ اَلْمُؤْمِنُ مِنْ جُحْرٍ مَرَّتَيْنِ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "A believer is not stung from the same hole twice."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5786 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Affliction (harm) does not come to a person except with his own hand."
records.arabicText: 5786 - لاَ يَجْنِي عَلَى اَلْمَرْءِ إِلاَّ يَدُهُ".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Affliction (harm) does not come to a person except with his own hand."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5787 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"The strong one is the one who overcomes himself (nafs)."
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The strong one is the one who overcomes himself (nafs)."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5788 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"'Hearing' (with the ears) is not equivalent to 'seeing' (with the eyes)."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5789 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"O' Allah (swt), bless my nation in its (utilizing) early mornings on its Saturdays and Thursdays."
records.arabicText: 5789 - اَللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لِأُمَّتِي فِي بُكُورِهَا يَوْمَ سَبْتِهَا وَ خَمِيسِهَا ".

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5790 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Gatherings are based on trust." (referring to that which is said and heard during gatherings)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5791 - The Prophet (sw) said; "The leader of a people should serve (the people)."
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The leader of a people should serve (the people)."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5792 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"If (even) a mountain were to oppress another mountain, Allah (swt) would crush it to dust."
records.arabicText: 5792 - لَوْ بَغَى جَبَلٌ عَلَى جَبَلٍ لَجَعَلَهُ اَللَّهُ دَكّاً".
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If (even) a mountain were to oppress another mountain, Allah (swt) would crush it to dust."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5793 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Begin (good behaviors and conduct) with those whom you support (family)."
records.thaqalaynMatn:
The Prophet (sw) said;
"Begin (good behaviors and conduct) with those whom you support (family)."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5794 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"War is deception." (War obfuscates truth, and is lacking in transparency and truth)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5795 - The Prophet (sw) said; "A Muslim is a mirror to his brother."
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "A Muslim is a mirror to his brother."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5796 - The Prophet (sw) said; "He died a natural death."
(spoken regarding a person who dies whilst not partaking in active jihad)
records.thaqalaynMatn:
The Prophet (sw) said; "He died a natural death."
(spoken regarding a person who dies whilst not partaking in active jihad)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5797 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Affliction is connected to speech." (words can bring about trials or difficulties)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.5798 - The Prophet (sw) said; "People are equal like the teeth of a comb."
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Prophet (sw) said; "People are equal like the teeth of a comb."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5799 - The Prophet (sw) said; "What disease is more severe than miserliness?"
5800
5800 - اَلْحَيَاءُ خَيْرٌ كُلُّهُ".
Hadith.5800 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Modesty is entirely good." (in its wellness and virtue)
5801
5801 - اَلْيَمِينُ اَلْفَاجِرَةُ تَذَرُ اَلدِّيَارَ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا بَلاَقِعَ".
Hadith.5801 - The Prophet (sw) said; "A false oath leaves homes desolate of their inhabitants."
records.thaqalaynMatn:
The Prophet (sw) said; "What disease is more severe than miserliness?"
5800
5800 - اَلْحَيَاءُ خَيْرٌ كُلُّهُ".
Hadith.5800 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Modesty is entirely good." (in its wellness and virtue)
5801
5801 - اَلْيَمِينُ اَلْفَاجِرَةُ تَذَرُ اَلدِّيَارَ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا بَلاَقِعَ".
Hadith.5801 - The Prophet (sw) said; "A false oath leaves homes desolate of their inhabitants."

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5802 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"The quickest evil to be punished is oppression." (by Allah (swt) in the Hereafter)
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The quickest evil to be punished is oppression." (by Allah (swt) in the Hereafter)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5803 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"The fastest good to be rewarded is righteousness." (by Allah (swt) in the Hereafter)
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The fastest good to be rewarded is righteousness." (by Allah (swt) in the Hereafter)

records.chapter: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.5804 - The Prophet (sw) said;
"Muslims are bound by their agreements." (that they make to others)
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Muslims are bound by their agreements." (that they make to others)
